applied_optimizations.name: Triton fused activation kernel
applied_optimizations.description: Implemented fused Triton kernel for Swish -> Divide by 2 -> Clamp -> Tanh -> Clamp. Uses tl.math.exp (not tl.libdevice), manual tanh implementation with clamping to [-10,10], BLOCK_SIZE aligned to 64 for MI355X wavefront, explicit float32 casting.

notes: Triton fused kernel achieves 1.05x speedup over PyTorch reference (0.940ms vs 0.991ms)
GEMM dominates at 98.3% of GPU time - this is the main optimization target
Fused activation kernel is very efficient at only 1.7% of GPU time

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent was killed again (no output) on trial 4. The agent keeps getting killed trying to read files or think too long. Need extremely minimal instructions. Best score remains 60.50 from trial 1. With 5

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: Agent was killed again with no output (trial 5). The agent keeps dying due to excessive thinking/reading. Must provide the exact code to write immediately. Score 60.50 is the baseline. Will try torch.

global_notes: Previous failed attempt used tl.libdevice.tanh which is unavailable on ROCm
Key fixes: use tl.math.exp, manual tanh with (exp(2x)-1)/(exp(2x)+1), BLOCK_SIZE multiple of 64
